title: Root Darkpass ☠
bodyText:
**DEAD — assassinated by the party (S20); [[eira-cavernborn|Eira]] obliterated the body.** Was leader of the Dwarven Stonemasons; his reckless secret dig into [[the-underdark|the Underdark]] broke open everything that followed.

# How it ended
Cornered in Darkpass Manor: claimed his family was dead, mocked [[pc-brolin|Brolin]], boasted of **"access to a hidden source of powerful magic"** — then his Misty Step **failed** because **Mr. Spells was standing in the dark: "Our business is over."** Root worked for — or dealt with — Spells, and Spells closed the account.

# What he left
- **His journal** — the party has it. Full entries: [[roots-journal]].
- A guild in a succession fight: **[[gilly]]**, **Drumnar**, **[[ghruom]]** — and [[thread-ghruoms-vendetta]].
- His weapons and armor (looted).
- A son whose god hung up, and a daughter he believed was dead.

> [!dm] The older genocide-negotiation draft ([[thundrak-durn|Thundrak Dûrn]] alliance, bio-weapons) was **softened in play**: the journal shows secrecy, greed, and ruthlessness, but the played Root read as a hard man with a dead family and a deal with Spells — not a genocidaire. The "hidden source of powerful magic" he claimed access to is UNRESOLVED and juicy: Spells' operation? [[the-pool|The pool]]? Thundrak Dûrn?

# Threads
